citation.description: Ticket comments record end-to-end proof: artifact 8e68-601a-b32d-4302 emitted 2026-07-10 21:04 UTC on change 492, auto-linked, committed and pushed to origin/tickets. Concrete specifics: artifact ID 8e68, change 492, timestamp 2026-07-10 21:04 UTC, author RebarBotNava.

criteria.criterion: code_review artifacts are written + pushed from prod reviews (no 'emission failed' warnings). [DONE in prod — change 492 / artifact 8e68]
autodeploy.sh re-runs fetch-secrets.sh before 'docker compose up' on a BOT_PATHS OR SECRETS_PATHS change; a new SSM-backed env key reaches the box on deploy without a manual boot.
On fetch-secrets failure the deploy aborts fail-safe (err marker + backoff, .env intact, running bot untouched, no rollback needed).
Tests cover: (a) fetch-secrets runs before compose up on a secrets-only change; (b) fetch-secrets failure aborts the deploy without building.
File paths: infra/scripts/autodeploy.sh (the code change); infra/scripts/fetch-secrets.sh, infra/terraform/ssm.tf (referenced/triggering, unchanged).
